title: Add store-entry mode chooser and guard /practice list by store
goal: Replace the /practice list dead-end with a store-first mode-choice flow: after selecting or creating a store in /sim/join, show a Simulator/Menu Practice chooser and route /practice through store selection without returnTo propagation.
constraints: Keep PublicOnlyRoute and AvatarSelectPage navigate behavior unchanged
Do not introduce returnTo queries, navigation-state redirect chains, or open-redirect helpers
Do not change practice queries, migrations, or schema; report missing practice tables as an environment blocker if encountered
Normalize selectedUser on store selection to prevent cross-store stale user leakage
No any, as any, ts-ignore, or ad-hoc eslint-disable
No extra changes outside the approved write set
acceptance: Store card click and new-store success both open the same mode-selection modal instead of navigating directly to /sim/join/avatar
Selecting Simulator routes to /sim/join/avatar with existing simulator behavior unchanged
/practice is protected by requireStore and direct access without a selected store redirects into /sim/join
PracticePage no longer renders the current user-facing dead-end copy for missing store state
Store selection also normalizes selectedUser to a same-store current-user avatar or null
/practice/menu/:menuId remains auth-only browse, and /practice/session/:sessionId plus /practice/admin remain unchanged
npm run build, npm run lint, and npx tsc --noEmit pass
